title: PM Lane 318 - Project Miner Temp Power Customer Delivery And Durable Proof Review Surface Design No-Live Packet
authority_basis: Standing PM blocker authority and repo technical authority, used here to convert Lane 317's delivery/proof contract into the next bounded PM-facing review surface definition without admitting storage, route, or delivery execution.
activation_condition: Lane 317 already defines the customer delivery and durable proof contract fields and validator rules.
No Temp Power PM-facing customer delivery and durable proof review-surface packet exists yet.
The next blocker after lane 317 is still design-only and does not yet justify storage or runtime admission.
current_truth: Lane 315 remains the hosted-green runtime baseline, and it still blocks delivery execution inside the current customer-preview review slice.

Lane 317 defines the future delivery/proof contract around preview-review linkage, recipient identity, delivery channel, delivered artifact refs, delivery timestamp, proof type/ref, and PM delivery approval fields.
The next bounded step is to define one PM-facing inspection-only review surface that shows this future delivery/proof contract clearly without creating a write path.
Storage planning, runtime persistence, readback routes, and any live durable delivery claim remain separate later packets.
Finance/payroll/billing/invoice/accounting outputs and source writeback remain outside this lane.
allowed_actions: Define required PM-facing review sections, display rules, review-only states, and export-safe artifacts for future delivery/proof inspection.
Keep the surface inspection-only and no-live.
Preserve visible blocked boundaries for finance, writeback, and runtime delivery execution.
not_allowed: No product code, schema, route, UI implementation, or hosted action.
No storage plan or persistence contract beyond read-only review-surface design.
No live or local POST claiming customer delivery or proof recording occurred.
No finance, payroll, billing, invoice, accounting, external finance sync, or source writeback work.
No auth, ingress, DNS, or secret changes.
validation: Decision label, selected outcome, required surface sections, display rules, and blocked-domain boundaries are present across touched lane 318 files
Canonical PM docs/status route the next follow-on step through review-surface design rather than storage or runtime delivery admission
git diff --check passes for touched lane 318 and canonical PM doc surfaces
validation_result: PASS: lane 318 defines the PM-facing delivery/proof review surface as inspection-only and keeps storage, runtime delivery, finance, and source-writeback widening deferred.
